title: NEPSE Index gains 15 points as banking sector rallies
summary: The Nepal Stock Exchange (NEPSE) witnessed a positive trend today, with the benchmark index gaining 15 points. Banking and insurance sectors were the top gainers.

title: New IPO announced for Himalayan Hydropower
summary: Himalayan Hydropower has announced its initial public offering (IPO) for the general public. The issue will open next week.

title: NRB maintains tight monetary policy in quarterly review
summary: Nepal Rastra Bank (NRB) has decided to maintain its current tight monetary policy in its latest quarterly review, citing inflationary pressures.

title: Market capitalization hits record high
summary: The total market capitalization of the companies listed on NEPSE reached an all-time high today, driven by strong performance in the manufacturing sector.
